# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the active release and main branches are supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| v1.0.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < v1.0  | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. 

Instead, report vulnerabilities by emailing the security response unit at **security@prahari.internal**.

### Process Details
1. Provide a detailed reproduction setup, including target REST/gRPC endpoints, payload examples, and exploitation evidence.
2. The team will acknowledge reports within 48 hours.
3. Vulnerabilities will be validated and a patch developed within 30 days.
4. Coordination on a public release date will be negotiated if the vulnerability affects public deployments.
